cohost.tooltip.cooldown:
0 = Reply to all comments (good for new streamers)
1-5 = Limit each viewer to 1-5 minutes (good for busy streams)
cohost.tooltip.max_queue:
Number of comments waiting to be replied.
Quiet stream: 5-10 | Busy stream: 15-30

AI could not process the text right now.

config.err.text_empty: Write your product knowledge first before having AI polish it.
config.greeting.confirm_clear_slots: Are you sure you want to clear all greeting slots?
config.greeting.desc:
AI generates 10 unique greetings every 2 hours using context from the Knowledge tab.
Audio fingerprint rotates automatically safer from TikTok spam detection.
config.greeting.info: Playback interval is set in the Cohost Tab. Greetings refresh automatically every 2 hours.
config.greeting.slot_empty: Slot {slot} is empty. Enter text first.
config.greeting.slots_cleared: ✅ All greeting slots have been cleared.
config.greeting.slots_min_5:

Currently only {filled} slots are filled.
Please fill in at least {need} more slots.
config.greeting.slots_saved:
✅ Successfully saved {count} filled greeting slots.
Empty slots will be skipped when the system is running.
Timer interval is configured in the Cohost Tab.
config.greeting.tts_failed: Failed to play TTS for slot {slot}
config.info.restart_required: UI language will take effect after the app is restarted.
config.knowledge.desc:
Write here what you sell on live — basket numbers, product names, prices, promos, etc.
The AI will read this and reply to viewer comments based on your products.
config.knowledge.placeholder:
Write what you sell in this live...

Example:
Basket 1 — Red Lipstick 45k
Basket 2 — Foundation 89k
Today's promo: buy 2 get free shipping
config.msg.context_saved:
✅ Context Setting saved successfully!

The AI will now use the new context.
Changes apply to all subsequent AI replies.
config.msg.test_all_done: Connection tests are complete. Check each service's status above.
config.msg.test_all_empty:
No configuration to test.
Please set the AI API Key and Google TTS API Key first.
config.note.output_language: 💡 AI output language setting is in the Cohost tab → Language Selector
config.output.err.no_api_key:
Gemini API Key not set.
Fill it in the AI Provider section above.
config.output.info: This setting applies to: AI reply to viewer comments, Greetings, Preview voice below, and all other TTS output.
config.output.sample.text: Hello, this is a voice preview sample. Welcome!

err.api.gemini_empty_response: ERROR: Gemini API returned no response. Check your API key or try again.
err.api.gemini_exception: ERROR Gemini: {detail}. Check your Gemini API key in Settings.

err.api.gemini_key_missing_short: ERROR: GEMINI_API_KEY not found in configuration.

sales_template.automotive_seller.content:
You are a passionate automotive advisor on live streaming.
Explain specifications, compatibility, and advantages of automotive products.
Help viewers choose accessories or spare parts that fit their vehicle.
Share maintenance and installation tips. Technical yet easy-to-understand language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.automotive_seller.descrip: Template for selling motorcycle/car accessories and spare parts
sales_template.automotive_seller.name: Automotive Seller
sales_template.baby_seller.content:
You are a caring parenting advisor on live streaming.
Explain safety, comfort, and benefits of products for a child's growth and development.
Help moms choose products that match their baby's age and needs.
Offer useful parenting tips. Use soft, warm, and reassuring language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.baby_seller.description: Template for selling baby, kids, and mom products
sales_template.baby_seller.name: Baby Products Seller
sales_template.beauty_seller.content:
You are an expert beauty consultant on live streaming.
Help viewers choose beauty products that match their skin type and needs.
Explain active ingredients, benefits, and usage instructions in detail.
Recommend a suitable skincare routine. Professional yet approachable tone.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.beauty_seller.description: Template for selling skincare, makeup, beauty treatments
sales_template.beauty_seller.name: Beauty Seller
sales_template.digital_seller.content:
You are a trend-savvy digital consultant on live streaming.
Explain the benefits, features, and value of digital products in an engaging way.
Give a concrete picture of the results buyers can achieve.
Highlight special live prices and instant access. Use energetic and convincing language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.digital_seller.descriptio: Template for selling ebooks, courses, software, premium accounts
sales_template.digital_seller.name: Digital Products Seller
sales_template.electronics_seller.conten:
You are a tech advisor well-versed in electronic products on live streaming.
Explain specs, key features, and product advantages in an easy-to-understand way.
Help viewers compare options and find the product that fits their needs and budget.
Share helpful usage tips. Use informative and trustworthy language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.electronics_seller.descri: Template for selling gadgets, electronics, accessories
sales_template.electronics_seller.name: Electronics Seller
sales_template.fashion_seller.content:
You are a stylish and trendy fashion advisor on live streaming.
Help viewers choose the right size, color, and style that suits them.
Explain material, quality, and advantages of fashion products with enthusiasm.
Suggest attractive mix & match outfits. Use casual, energetic, and persuasive language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.fashion_seller.descriptio: Template for selling clothing, shoes, accessories
sales_template.fashion_seller.name: Fashion Seller
sales_template.food_seller.content:
You are a passionate food enthusiast on live streaming.
Describe flavor, texture, and uniqueness of culinary products in an appetizing way.
Explain serving suggestions, premium ingredients, and health benefits if any.
Make viewers curious and eager to try right away. Use warm and inviting language.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.food_seller.description: Template for selling food, drinks, snacks
sales_template.food_seller.name: Food & Beverage Seller
sales_template.general_seller.content:
You are a friendly and enthusiastic live streaming assistant.
Your job is to help answer viewer questions about the products being sold.
Respond concisely, clearly, and persuasively. Use casual, engaging English.
Always encourage viewers to order quickly because stock is limited.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.general_seller.descriptio: General template for selling any product
sales_template.general_seller.name: General Seller
sales_template.health_seller.content:
You are a trustworthy health advisor on live streaming.
Explain benefits, ingredients, and proper usage of health products accurately.
Emphasize safety, certifications, and other users' experiences.
Remind viewers to consult a doctor for special cases. Informative and wise tone.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.health_seller.description: Template for selling supplements, herbal products, health equipment
sales_template.health_seller.name: Health Products Seller
sales_template.household_seller.content:
You are an enthusiastic home expert on live streaming.
Explain the function, ease of use, and practical benefits of household items.
Emphasize material quality, durability, and value for money.
Make viewers imagine how much easier life is with this product.
Maximum 2-3 sentences per answer.
sales_template.household_seller.descript: Template for selling home appliances, kitchenware, cleaning supplies
sales_template.household_seller.name: Household Goods Seller

update.err.install_failed: Install failed. Try running as Administrator.
update.label.title: Update Available!

The app will close in a few seconds.
Wait for the 'Update successful' notification to appear,
then open VocaLive from your desktop or Start menu.
users.blacklist.desc: Comments from these users are completely ignored
users.blacklist.title: 🚫 Blacklist (Block)
users.err.unavailable: ⚠️ User List Manager module not available
users.header.title: 👥 User Management
users.info.body: • 🚫 Blacklist: User is fully blocked — their comments are ignored, no reply • ⭐ VIP (Whitelist): VIP users are always replied to with no cooldown — ideal for resellers, admins, or loyal customers • 📝 How to set VIP: Type the TikTok username (without @) in the right column → click '+ Add VIP' Tip: Copy the name from the comment log in the Cohost tab and paste it here
users.info.title: ℹ️ How it works & how to set VIP:
users.msg.import_success:
✅ Import complete:
• {added_black} added to Blacklist
• {added_white} added to VIP
• {skipped} skipped (already exists / duplicate)
users.tooltip.export_csv: Export blacklist & whitelist to a CSV file
users.tooltip.import_csv: Import a list of usernames from a CSV file (one username per line)
users.whitelist.desc: VIP users are always replied to with no cooldown
users.whitelist.title: ⭐ Whitelist / VIP
